name: Lasso Security
description: MCP red-teaming platform and threat intelligence for agentic AI. Covers prompt injection detection, tool abuse scenarios, and MCP-specific attack surface mapping — enterprise-grade research backed by a commercial runtime security offering.

name: Zscaler
description: AI Broker + Agent Registry broker MCP and agent-to-agent (A2A) traffic at the network control plane; added AI red-teaming for MCP servers. The clearest network-level leader.

name: Palo Alto Networks
description: Prisma AIRS for runtime AI security, plus Idira (built on its CyberArk acquisition) for agentic identity. Network + identity in one stack.

name: Zenity
description: Agentic AI security posture management (AISPM) with MCP-aware governance and step-level context inspection. The pure-play posture leader.

name: Salt Security
description: Agentic Security Platform mapping the Agentic Security Graph across LLMs, MCP servers, and APIs; strong on eliminating shadow MCP.

name: CrowdStrike
description: Continuous Identity for AI Agents: cryptographically verifiable agent identity (SPIFFE), ownership preserved through sub-agent delegation, zero-standing-privilege.

name: SailPoint (+ Entro)
description: Agentic Fabric for agent and non-human identity governance; acquiring Tel Aviv's Entro for deep secrets discovery and NHI scanning.

name: MintMCP
description: Enterprise MCP gateway: SSO, RBAC, and virtual MCP bundling. The managed gateway that deploys without infra overhead.

name: TrueFoundry
description: MCP gateway / control plane enforcing OAuth identity injection, per-tool RBAC, and immutable audit logs across servers.

name: Operant AI
description: MCP gateway with runtime protection, identity-aware enforcement, and NHI security; also a leading source of MCP threat research.

name: Runlayer
description: Access control and rate-limiting purpose-built for high-volume agent orchestration at scale.

name: Cisco AI Defense
description: Network/edge AI defense layer for MCP and agent traffic. Honorable mention for enterprises with existing Cisco estates.

name: Cloudflare
description: Edge-level protection and observability for AI agent and MCP endpoints. Honorable mention for cloud-native teams.

name: Akamai
description: Edge security and delivery controls applicable to MCP gateway deployments. Honorable mention for regulated industries.

name: Beyond Identity (Ceros)
description: Passwordless identity and device trust for agentic workflows. Honorable mention in the identity layer.

name: Microsoft Entra Agent ID
description: Agent identity within the Microsoft ecosystem. Honorable mention for Entra-centric enterprises.

name: Noma Security
description: Runtime AI security and posture for agentic applications. Honorable mention in runtime/posture layer.

name: Cyera
description: Data security posture and lineage for AI agent data flows. Honorable mention for data governance teams.

name: IBM MCP Gateway (ContextForge Enterprise)
description: Enterprise deployment of IBM ContextForge with managed support. Honorable mention bridging open source and enterprise.

name: Microsoft MCP Gateway
description: Microsoft's MCP gateway for Azure and Copilot ecosystems. Honorable mention for Microsoft-first shops.
